items.title: Merck KGaA and Remepy join forces to develop combo drug-digital therapies
items.summary: Merck KGaA and Remepy will work in tandem to develop drug-digital therapy combinations for a rare cancer indication.

items.title: Seaport and Hemab target $180m IPOs as biotech listings accumulate
items.summary: Seaport will use the funds for its neuropsychiatric drug pipeline, while Hemab will focus on bleeding disorder medicines.

items.title: BioMarin acquires Amicus Therapeutics for $4.8bn
items.summary: BioMarin Pharmaceutical has completed its acquisition of Amicus Therapeutics, buying the company for $14.50 per share in an all-cash deal.

items.title: FDA approves AstraZeneca’s Saphnelo for SLE
items.summary: AstraZeneca has received approval from the FDA for the subcutaneous self-administration of Saphnelo using the Saphnelo pen for SLE.

items.title: Early detection of bowel Cancer in the UK represents success of screening program
items.summary: With the introduction of a home testing kit, it is easier for people to get screened for bowel cancer.
